name: Traditional Scotch Broth
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Neck of mutton or beef
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper to taste.
Put the meat, water, salt, and washed pearl barley into a large saucepan. Bring to a boil very slowly and skim. Dice the vegetables and wash and shred the cabbage. Add them all to the pan. Bring the soup back to a boil again and simmer very gently until the meat is cooked and the peas are tender - about two hours. Add parsley and salt and pepper to taste.
